name: Magdalene Marble Table Lamp (Set of 2) - 29 Inch Height - TBL4069 - White Marble/Gold - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the elegant Magdalene marble table lamp. Featuring a stunning combination of white marble and antique gold, this lamp adds a touch of sophistication to any room. The smooth white marble base offers subtle veining, making each piece unique while providing a clean and classic look. The antique gold finish on the stem and details enhances its timeless design. 

Perfect for reading nooks or as a statement piece on your side table, this lamp blends beautifully with various decor styles from modern to traditional. The balanced construction and graceful aesthetics invite compliments and create a warm ambiance in your home. Bring a touch of refinement and charm to your space with the graceful glow of the Magdalene marble table lamp.
